domain: Cape Verdean morna (UNESCO ICH 2019, ~200 y/o from Boa Vista + Brava islands): voice + music + poetry + dance practice; sodade longing emotion (creole-saudade specific to distance/departure/uncertain return); transmission across diaspora island chain with migrants; lyrics improvised on fixed themes (love/departure/reunion/longing/ocean); multi-instrument (guitar + violin + ten-string + cavaquinho + ukulele)
specific_mechanism: MORNA-SODADE-DIASPORA-NARRATIVE-CASCADE: information-cascade with sodade emotional-anchor + K-island diaspora distinct-style cascade + fixed-themes generation grammar + per-stage improvisation budget + multi-instrument parallel channels + diaspora return-loop. (1) Sodade anchor embedding e_sodade = persistent longing-displacement-emotion anchor that gates every stage in the cascade (cross-attention forced). (2) K-island diaspora cascade: K distinct LLM instances {M_1, ..., M_K} each with own narrative-style prior; messages pass through cascade and each M_k refines + retells. (3) Fixed-themes generation grammar: messages must conform to theme-grammar G_theme constraint set (love/departure/reunion/longing/ocean) — generative output constrained by template. (4) Improvisation budget b_k per island: each M_k has fixed budget b_k tokens free improvisation atop fixed-theme template (controlled creativity per stage). (5) Multi-instrument K_inst parallel output channels: at each stage, K_inst parallel decoder heads produce variant outputs (guitar/violin/cavaquinho-equivalent) — analog of multi-head ensemble decoders. (6) Diaspora return-loop: messages flow forward through K islands then loop back to origin with accumulated context (returning ballad bringing news home — analog of bi-directional cycle with accumulation). (7) Differs from R505 KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE-INFOFLOW (cistern-buffer + wind-tower thermal damping, no sodade-anchor + no fixed-theme grammar + no return-loop) and R413 CHASQUI relay-runner (discrete pass-through) by sodade emotional-anchor cross-attention gate + K-island diaspora distinct narrative-style + fixed-themes G_theme grammar + per-stage improvisation budget + multi-instrument parallel decoder + diaspora return-loop accumulation.
llm_application: MORNA-SODADE-DIASPORA-NARRATIVE-CASCADE sodade anchor cross-attention gating + K-island distinct-style cascade refinement + fixed-themes G_theme grammar constraint generation + per-stage improvisation budget b_k token allocation + K_inst multi-instrument parallel decoder heads + diaspora return-loop accumulation. Differs from R413 CHASQUI. R422. R429 KAMI-SHIBAI. R438 PIROGUE. R455 HAUSA. R480 RINGDANS. R493 EISTEDDFOD. R505 KASHAN-QANAT-CASCADE-INFOFLOW (closest — cistern-buffer + wind-tower thermal, no sodade-anchor + no return-loop). Differs from Unified Cascade Routing 2410.10347 + Nemotron-Cascade 2 + LLM MoT Cascade + LLM Edge-Cloud-Expert by sodade anchor + fixed-themes grammar + improvisation budget + multi-instrument decoder + return-loop. Differs by SODADE ANCHOR + K-ISLAND DISTINCT STYLE + FIXED-THEMES GRAMMAR + IMPROVISATION BUDGET + MULTI-INSTRUMENT + RETURN-LOOP.
novelty_claim: Unified Cascade Routing + Nemotron-Cascade 2 + LLM MoT Cascade + LLM Edge-Cloud-Expert Cascade literature cover cascade routing + multi-stage refinement space. MORNA-SODADE-DIASPORA-NARRATIVE-CASCADE adds (a) sodade emotional-anchor cross-attention gate + (b) K-island distinct narrative-style + (c) fixed-themes generation grammar + (d) per-stage improvisation budget + (e) multi-instrument parallel decoder + (f) diaspora return-loop accumulation. Recombination — borderline lookup.
